title: pelargonium × heraldicum
intro: Pelargonium × heraldicum, also known as Geranium or Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, known for its distinctive leaves and white or pale pink flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × heraldicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive problems, as well as its potential to help with anxiety and stress relief. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
